translations.Your password was reset by an administra: گذرواژه‌تان به دست مدیری بازنشانی شد
translations.Your email address was changed by an adm: نشانی رایانامه‌تان به دست مدیری عوض شد
translations.You created an app password for a sessio: You created an app password for a session named "{token}"
translations.An administrator created an app password: An administrator created an app password for a session named "{token}"
translations.You deleted app password \"{token}\" and: You deleted app password "{token}" and cancelled its pending remote wipe
translations.You renamed app password \"{token}\" to: نام گذرواژهٔ کارهٔ «{token}» را به «{newToken}» تغییر دادید
translations.You granted filesystem access to app pas: دسترسی به سامانه‌پرونده را به گذرواژهٔ کارهٔ «{token}» اعطا کردید
translations.You revoked filesystem access from app p: دسترسی به سامانه‌پرونده را از گذرواژهٔ کارهٔ «{token}» گرفتید
translations.You successfully logged in using two-fac: شما با موفقیت با استفاده از تأیید هویت دو عاملی وارد سیستم شدید(%1$s)
translations.A login attempt using two-factor authent: تلاش برای ورود به سیستم با استفاده از تأیید هویت دو عاملی انجام نشد (%1$s)
translations.Remote wipe was started on %1$s: پاک کردن از راه دور شروع شد %1$s
translations.Remote wipe has finished on %1$s: پاک کردن از راه دور به پایان رسید%1$s
translations.Your <strong>password</strong> or <stron: پسورد و یا پست الکترونیک شما ویراش شد.
translations.Unable to change personal password: نمی‌توان گذرواژه شخصی را تغییر داد
translations.Unable to change password. Password too: Unable to change password. Password too long.
translations.Please provide an admin recovery passwor: Please provide an admin recovery password; otherwise, all account data will be lost.
translations.Wrong admin recovery password. Please ch: رمز مدیریتی بازیابی غلط است. لطفاً رمز را کنترل کرده و دوباره امتحان نمایید.
translations.Backend does not support password change: Backend does not support password change, but the encryption of the account key was updated.
translations.If you received this email, the email co: اگر این پست الکترونیک را دریافت کردید ، پیکربندی ایمیل درست است.
translations.Email could not be sent. Check your mail: پست الکترونیک قابل ارسال نیست. ورود به سیستم سرور پست الکترونیک خود را بررسی کنید
translations.A problem occurred while sending the ema: ارسال پست الکترونیک با خطا مواجه شد، لطفاً تنظیمات خود را مورد بازبینی قرار دهید. (خطا:%s)
translations.You need to set your account email befor: You need to set your account email before being able to send test emails. Go to %s for that.
translations.Unable to change full name: امکان تغییر نام کامل وجود ندارد
translations.Unable to set invalid phone number: Unable to set invalid phone number
translations.In order to verify your Twitter account,: به منظور تأیید حساب توییتر خود ، توییت زیر را در توییتر قرار دهید (لطفاً آن را بدون هیچگونه فاصله بین خطوط ارسال کنید):
translations.In order to verify your Website, store t:
برای تأیید وب سایت خود ، مطالب زیر را در ریشه وب خود در سایت ذخیره کنید:
 '.well-known/CloudIdVerificationCode.txt' 
(لطفاً اطمینان حاصل کنید که تمام متن در یک خط است):
%1$s رمزعبور خود را تغییر داد به %2$s
translations.Your password on %s was reset by an admi: رمز عبور شما توسط یک مدیر به %s تنظیم مجدد شد.
translations.If you did not request this, please cont: اگر این درخواست را نکردید ، با یک مدیر تماس بگیرید.
پست الکترونیک شما به %s تغییر یافت
translations.Your email address on %s was changed by: پست الکترونیک شما توط یک مدیر به %s  تنظیم مجدد شد.
translations.Email address for %1$s changed on %2$s: پست الکترونیک از %1$s به %2$s تغییر یافت.
translations.The new email address is %s: آدرس پست الکترونیک جدید %s می باشد.
translations.Welcome to your %s account, you can add,: %s به حساب کاربری خود خوش آمدید ،شما می توانید اضافه کنید ، محافظت و اطلاعات خود را اشتراک به بگذارید.
translations.Set your password: کلمه ی عبور خود را تنظیم کنید
translations.Logged in account must be a sub admin: Logged in account must be a sub admin
translations.Mail provider enables sending emails dir: Mail provider enables sending emails directly through the user's personal email account. At present, this functionality is limited to calendar invitations. It requires Nextcloud Mail 4.1 and an email account in Nextcloud Mail that matches the user's email address in Nextcloud.
translations.Configuration key \"%1$s\" expects an ar: Configuration key "%1$s" expects an array (%2$s found). Admin IP range validation will not be applied.
translations.Configuration key \"%1$s\" contains inva: Configuration key "%1$s" contains invalid IP range(s): "%2$s"
translations.Admin IP filtering is correctly configur: Admin IP filtering is correctly configured.
translations.Some app directories are owned by a diff:
Some app directories are owned by a different user than the web server one. This may be the case if apps have been installed manually. Check the permissions of the following app directories:
%s
translations.App directories have the correct owner \: App directories have the correct owner "%s"
translations.Your remote address could not be determi: Your remote address could not be determined.
translations.Your remote address was identified as \": Your remote address was identified as "%s" and is brute-force throttled at the moment slowing down the performance of various requests. If the remote address is not your address this can be an indication that a proxy is not configured correctly.
translations.Your remote address \"%s\" is not brute-: Your remote address "%s" is not brute-force throttled.
translations.A background job is pending that checks: A background job is pending that checks for administration imported SSL certificates. Please check back later.
translations.There are some administration imported S: There are some administration imported SSL certificates present, that are not used anymore with Nextcloud 21. They can be imported on the command line via "occ security:certificates:import" command. Their paths inside the data directory are shown below.
translations.Integrity checker has been disabled. Int: Integrity checker has been disabled. Integrity cannot be verified.
translations.Some files have not passed the integrity: Some files have not passed the integrity check. {link1} {link2}
translations.It was not possible to execute the cron:
It was not possible to execute the cron job via CLI. The following technical errors have appeared:
%s
The last cron job ran without errors.
translations.Last background job execution ran %s. So: Last background job execution ran %s. Something seems wrong. {link}.
translations.Your data directory and files are probab: Your data directory and files are probably accessible from the internet. The .htaccess file is not working. It is strongly recommended that you configure your web server so that the data directory is no longer accessible, or move the data directory outside the web server document root.
translations.Could not check that the data directory: Could not check that the data directory is protected. Please check manually that your server does not allow access to the data directory.
translations.The database is missing some optional co: The database is missing some optional columns. Due to the fact that adding columns on big tables could take some time they were not added automatically when they can be optional. By running "occ db:add-missing-columns" those missing columns could be added manually while the instance keeps running. Once the columns are added some features might improve responsiveness or usability.
Detected some missing optional indices. Occasionally new indices are added (by Nextcloud or installed applications) to improve database performance. Adding indices can sometimes take awhile and temporarily hurt performance so this is not done automatically during upgrades. Once the indices are added, queries to those tables should be faster. Use the command `occ db:add-missing-indices` to add them.
translations.The database is missing some primary key: The database is missing some primary keys. Due to the fact that adding primary keys on big tables could take some time they were not added automatically. By running "occ db:add-missing-primary-keys" those missing primary keys could be added manually while the instance keeps running.
translations.Some columns in the database are missing: Some columns in the database are missing a conversion to big int. Due to the fact that changing column types on big tables could take some time they were not changed automatically. By running "occ db:convert-filecache-bigint" those pending changes could be applied manually. This operation needs to be made while the instance is offline.
This instance is running in debug mode. Only enable this for local development and not in production environments.
translations.Your installation has no default phone r: Your installation has no default phone region set. This is required to validate phone numbers in the profile settings without a country code. To allow numbers without a country code, please add "default_phone_region" with the respective ISO 3166-1 code of the region to your config file.
translations.Mail delivery is disabled by instance co: Mail delivery is disabled by instance config "%s".
translations.You have not set or verified your email: You have not set or verified your email server configuration, yet. Please head over to the "Basic settings" in order to set them. Afterwards, use the "Send email" button below the form to verify your settings.
Transactional File Locking is disabled. This is not a a supported configuraton. It may lead to difficult to isolate problems including file corruption. Please remove the `'filelocking.enabled' => false` configuration entry from your `config.php` to avoid these problems.
translations.The database is used for transactional f: The database is used for transactional file locking. To enhance performance, please configure memcache, if available.
translations.Your \"trusted_proxies\" setting is not: Your "trusted_proxies" setting is not correctly set, it should be an array.
Your "trusted_proxies" setting is not correctly set, it should be an array of IP addresses - optionally with range in CIDR notation.
translations.The reverse proxy header configuration i: The reverse proxy header configuration is incorrect. This is a security issue and can allow an attacker to spoof their IP address as visible to the Nextcloud.
translations.Your IP address was resolved as %s: Your IP address was resolved as %s
translations.The reverse proxy header configuration i: The reverse proxy header configuration is incorrect, or you are accessing Nextcloud from a trusted proxy. If not, this is a security issue and can allow an attacker to spoof their IP address as visible to the Nextcloud.
translations.Accessing site insecurely via HTTP. You: Accessing site insecurely via HTTP. You are strongly advised to set up your server to require HTTPS instead. Without it some important web functionality like "copy to clipboard" or "service workers" will not work!
translations.You are accessing your instance over a s: You are accessing your instance over a secure connection, however your instance is generating insecure URLs. This likely means that your instance is behind a reverse proxy and the Nextcloud `overwrite*` config values are not set correctly.
translations.Your instance is generating insecure URL: Your instance is generating insecure URLs. If you access your instance over HTTPS, this likely means that your instance is behind a reverse proxy and the Nextcloud `overwrite*` config values are not set correctly.
translations.You are accessing your instance over a s: You are accessing your instance over a secure connection, and your instance is generating secure URLs.
translations.Internet connectivity is disabled in con: Internet connectivity is disabled in configuration file.
translations.This server has no working internet conn: This server has no working internet connection: Multiple endpoints could not be reached. This means that some of the features like mounting external storage, notifications about updates or installation of third-party apps will not work. Accessing files remotely and sending of notification emails might not work, either. Establish a connection from this server to the internet to enjoy all features.
translations.Unable to run check for JavaScript suppo: Unable to run check for JavaScript support. Please remedy or confirm manually if your webserver serves `.mjs` files using the JavaScript MIME type.
translations.Your webserver does not serve `.mjs` fil: Your webserver does not serve `.mjs` files using the JavaScript MIME type. This will break some apps by preventing browsers from executing the JavaScript files. You should configure your webserver to serve `.mjs` files with either the `text/javascript` or `application/javascript` MIME type.
Your webserver is not set up to serve `.js.map` files. Without these files, JavaScript Source Maps won't function properly, making it more challenging to troubleshoot and debug any issues that may arise.
translations.The old server-side-encryption format is: The old server-side-encryption format is enabled. We recommend disabling this.
translations.The %1$s configuration option must be a: The %1$s configuration option must be a valid integer value.
سطح گزارش‌دهی روی حالت اشکال‌زدایی (debug) تنظیم شده است. از سطح اشکال‌زدایی تنها زمانی استفاده کنید که مشکلی برای تشخیص دارید، سپس سطح گزارش خود را به حالت کم‌حجم‌تری بازگردانید زیرا این حالت حجم زیادی از اطلاعات را خروجی می‌دهد و می‌تواند بر عملکرد نمونهٔ شما تأثیر منفی بگذارد.
سطح گزارش‌دهی به درستی تنظیم شد.
translations.Server has no maintenance window start t: Server has no maintenance window start time configured. This means resource intensive daily background jobs will also be executed during your main usage time. We recommend to set it to a time of low usage, so users are less impacted by the load caused from these heavy tasks.
translations.Maintenance window to execute heavy back: Maintenance window to execute heavy background jobs is between {start}:00 UTC and {end}:00 UTC
translations.Memcached is configured as distributed c: Memcached is configured as distributed cache, but the wrong PHP module ("memcache") is installed. Please install the PHP module "memcached".
Memcached is configured as distributed cache, but the PHP module "memcached" is not installed. Please install the PHP module "memcached".
translations.No memory cache has been configured. To: No memory cache has been configured. To enhance performance, please configure a memcache, if available.
translations.Failed to write and read a value from lo: Failed to write and read a value from local cache.
translations.Failed to write and read a value from di: Failed to write and read a value from distributed cache.
translations.One or more mimetype migrations are avai: One or more mimetype migrations are available. Occasionally new mimetypes are added to better handle certain file types. Migrating the mimetypes take a long time on larger instances so this is not done automatically during upgrades. Use the command `occ maintenance:repair --include-expensive` to perform the migrations.
translations.None of your tables use ROW_FORMAT=Compr: None of your tables use ROW_FORMAT=Compressed
translations.Incorrect row format found in your datab: Incorrect row format found in your database. ROW_FORMAT=Dynamic offers the best database performances for Nextcloud. Please update row format on the following list: %s.
translations.MySQL is used as database and does suppo: MySQL is used as database and does support 4-byte characters
translations.MySQL is used as database but does not s: MySQL is used as database but does not support 4-byte characters. To be able to handle 4-byte characters (like emojis) without issues in filenames or comments for example it is recommended to enable the 4-byte support in MySQL.
translations.Could not check if your web server prope: Could not check if your web server properly resolves the OCM and OCS provider URLs.
translations.Your web server is not properly set up t:
Your web server is not properly set up to resolve %1$s.
This is most likely related to a web server configuration that was not updated to deliver this folder directly.
Please compare your configuration against the shipped rewrite rules in ".htaccess" for Apache or the provided one in the documentation for Nginx.
On Nginx those are typically the lines starting with "location ~" that need an update.
translations.The \"overwrite.cli.url\" option in your: The "overwrite.cli.url" option in your config.php is correctly set to "%s".
The "overwrite.cli.url" option in your config.php is set to "%s" which is a correct URL. Suggested URL is "%s".
Please make sure to set the "overwrite.cli.url" option in your config.php file to the URL that your users mainly use to access this Nextcloud. Suggestion: "%s". Otherwise there might be problems with the URL generation via cron. (It is possible though that the suggested URL is not the URL that your users mainly use to access this Nextcloud. Best is to double check this in any case.)
translations.Your APCu cache has been running full, c: Your APCu cache has been running full, consider increasing the apc.shm_size php setting.
translations.Your APCu cache is almost full at %s%%,: Your APCu cache is almost full at %s%%, consider increasing the apc.shm_size php setting.
translations.PHP configuration option \"default_chars: PHP configuration option "default_charset" should be UTF-8
translations.The PHP function \"set_time_limit\" is n: The PHP function "set_time_limit" is not available. This could result in scripts being halted mid-execution, breaking your installation. Enabling this function is strongly recommended.
translations.Your PHP does not have FreeType support,: Your PHP does not have FreeType support, resulting in breakage of profile pictures and the settings interface.
translations.PHP does not seem to be setup properly t: PHP does not seem to be setup properly to query system environment variables. The test with getenv("PATH") only returns an empty response.
The PHP upload_max_filesize is too low. A size of at least %1$s is recommended. Current value: %2$s.
translations.The PHP post_max_size is too low. A size: The PHP post_max_size is too low. A size of at least %1$s is recommended. Current value: %2$s.
translations.The PHP max_input_time is too low. A tim: The PHP max_input_time is too low. A time of at least %1$s is recommended. Current value: %2$s.
translations.The PHP max_execution_time is too low. A: The PHP max_execution_time is too low. A time of at least %1$s is recommended. Current value: %2$s.
translations.The PHP memory limit is below the recomm: The PHP memory limit is below the recommended value of %s. Some features or apps - including the Updater - may not function properly.
translations.increases language translation performan: increases language translation performance and fixes sorting of non-ASCII characters
translations.for Argon2 for password hashing and Ed25: for Argon2 for password hashing and Ed25519 signature verification for RFC 9421 http message signatures
translations.required for SFTP storage and recommende: required for SFTP storage and recommended for WebAuthn performance
translations.for picture rotation in server and metad: for picture rotation in server and metadata extraction in the Photos app
translations.This instance is missing some required P: This instance is missing some required PHP modules. It is required to install them: %s.
translations.This instance is missing some recommende:
This instance is missing some recommended PHP modules. For improved performance and better compatibility it is highly recommended to install them:
%s
translations.The PHP OPcache module is not loaded. Fo: The PHP OPcache module is not loaded. For better performance it is recommended to load it into your PHP installation.
translations.OPcache is disabled. For better performa: OPcache is disabled. For better performance, it is recommended to apply "opcache.enable=1" to your PHP configuration.
translations.The shared memory based OPcache is disab: The shared memory based OPcache is disabled. For better performance, it is recommended to apply "opcache.file_cache_only=0" to your PHP configuration and use the file cache as second level cache only.
translations.OPcache is not working as it should, opc: OPcache is not working as it should, opcache_get_status() returns false, please check configuration.
translations.The maximum number of OPcache keys is ne: The maximum number of OPcache keys is nearly exceeded. To assure that all scripts can be kept in the cache, it is recommended to apply "opcache.max_accelerated_files" to your PHP configuration with a value higher than "%s".
translations.The OPcache buffer is nearly full. To as: The OPcache buffer is nearly full. To assure that all scripts can be hold in cache, it is recommended to apply "opcache.memory_consumption" to your PHP configuration with a value higher than "%s".
translations.The OPcache interned strings buffer is n: The OPcache interned strings buffer is nearly full. To assure that repeating strings can be effectively cached, it is recommended to apply "opcache.interned_strings_buffer" to your PHP configuration with a value higher than "%s".
translations.OPcache is configured to remove code com: OPcache is configured to remove code comments. With OPcache enabled, "opcache.save_comments=1" must be set for Nextcloud to function.
translations.Nextcloud is not allowed to use the OPca: Nextcloud is not allowed to use the OPcache API. With OPcache enabled, it is highly recommended to include all Nextcloud directories with "opcache.restrict_api" or unset this setting to disable OPcache API restrictions, to prevent errors during Nextcloud core or app upgrades.
translations.Checking from CLI, OPcache checks have b: Checking from CLI, OPcache checks have been skipped.
translations.The PHP OPcache module is not properly c: The PHP OPcache module is not properly configured. %s.
translations.You are currently running PHP %1$s. PHP: You are currently running PHP %1$s. PHP %2$s is deprecated since Nextcloud %3$s. Nextcloud %4$s may require at least PHP %5$s. Please upgrade to one of the officially supported PHP versions provided by the PHP Group as soon as possible.
translations.PHP configuration option \"output_buffer: گزینه «output_buffering» تنظیمات پی‌اچ‌پی باید غیرفعال شود
translations.This is the unsupported community build: This is the unsupported community build of Nextcloud. Given the size of this instance, performance, reliability and scalability cannot be guaranteed. Push notifications are limited to avoid overloading our free service. Learn more about the benefits of Nextcloud Enterprise at {link}.
translations.No suitable source for randomness found: No suitable source for randomness found by PHP which is highly discouraged for security reasons.
translations.The read-only config has been enabled. T: The read-only config has been enabled. This prevents setting some configurations via the web-interface. Furthermore, the file needs to be made writable manually for every update.
translations.You have more than %s rows in the schedu: You have more than %s rows in the scheduling objects table. Please run the expensive repair jobs via occ maintenance:repair --include-expensive.
translations.Scheduling objects table size is within: Scheduling objects table size is within acceptable range.
translations.- The `%1$s` HTTP header is not set to `: - The `%1$s` HTTP header is not set to `%2$s`. Some features might not work correctly, as it is recommended to adjust this setting accordingly.
- The `%1$s` HTTP header is not set to `%2$s`. This is a potential security or privacy risk, as it is recommended to adjust this setting accordingly.
- The `%1$s` HTTP header is not set to `%2$s`, `%3$s`, `%4$s`, `%5$s` or `%6$s`. This can leak referer information. See the {w3c-recommendation}.
translations.- The `Strict-Transport-Security` HTTP h: - The `Strict-Transport-Security` HTTP header is not set to at least `%d` seconds (current value: `%d`). For enhanced security, it is recommended to use a long HSTS policy.
- The `Strict-Transport-Security` HTTP header is malformed: `%s`. For enhanced security, it is recommended to enable HSTS.
- The `Strict-Transport-Security` HTTP header is not set (should be at least `%d` seconds). For enhanced security, it is recommended to enable HSTS.
translations.Some headers are not set correctly on yo: Some headers are not set correctly on your instance
translations.Could not check that your web server ser: Could not check that your web server serves security headers correctly. Please check manually.
Could not check that your web server serves security headers correctly, unable to query `%s`
translations.Your server is correctly configured to s: Your server is correctly configured to send security headers.
translations.Server identifier isn’t configured. It i: Server identifier isn’t configured. It is recommended if your Nextcloud instance is running on several PHP servers. Add a server ID in your configuration.
"%d" is not a valid server identifier. It must be between 0 and 511.
translations.Server identifier is configured and vali: Server identifier is configured and valid.
translations.MariaDB version 10.3 detected, this vers: MariaDB version 10.3 detected, this version is end-of-life and only supported as part of Ubuntu 20.04. MariaDB >=%1$s and <=%2$s is suggested for best performance, stability and functionality with this version of Nextcloud.
translations.MariaDB version \"%1$s\" detected. Maria: MariaDB version "%1$s" detected. MariaDB >=%2$s and <=%3$s is suggested for best performance, stability and functionality with this version of Nextcloud.
translations.MySQL version \"%1$s\" detected. MySQL >: MySQL version "%1$s" detected. MySQL >=%2$s and <=%3$s is suggested for best performance, stability and functionality with this version of Nextcloud.
translations.PostgreSQL version \"%1$s\" detected. Po: PostgreSQL version "%1$s" detected. PostgreSQL >=%2$s and <=%3$s is suggested for best performance, stability and functionality with this version of Nextcloud.
translations.Nextcloud %d does not support your curre: Nextcloud %d does not support your current version, so be sure to update the database before updating your Nextcloud Server.
translations.Oracle version \"%1$s\" detected. Oracle: Oracle version "%1$s" detected. Oracle >=%2$s and <=%3$s is suggested for best performance, stability and functionality with this version of Nextcloud.
translations.SQLite is currently being used as the ba: SQLite is currently being used as the backend database. For larger installations we recommend that you switch to a different database backend. This is particularly recommended when using the desktop client for file synchronisation. To migrate to another database use the command line tool: "occ db:convert-type".
translations.It seems like you are running a 32-bit P: It seems like you are running a 32-bit PHP version. Nextcloud needs 64-bit to run well. Please upgrade your OS and PHP to 64-bit!
_No scheduled tasks in the last day._::_: No scheduled tasks in the last day.
No scheduled tasks in the last %n days.
_The task pickup speed has been ok in th: The task pickup speed has been ok in the last day.
The task pickup speed has been ok in the last %n days.
_The task pickup speed has been slow in: The task pickup speed has been slow in the last day. Many tasks took longer than 4 minutes to be picked up. Consider setting up a worker to process tasks in the background.
The task pickup speed has been slow in the last %n days. Many tasks took longer than 4 minutes to be picked up. Consider setting up a worker to process tasks in the background.
_Most tasks were successful in the last: Most tasks were successful in the last day.
Most tasks were successful in the last %n days.
A lot of tasks failed in the last day. Consider checking the nextcloud log for errors and investigating whether the AI provider apps have been set up correctly.
A lot of tasks failed in the last %n days. Consider checking the nextcloud log for errors and investigating whether the AI provider apps have been set up correctly.
_The Task Processing worker has run in t: The Task Processing worker has run in the last %n minute.
The Task Processing worker has run in the last %n minutes.
translations.The Task Processing worker does not seem: The Task Processing worker does not seem to be running. The last run was at %s.
The Task Processing worker does not seem to be running. It seems it has never run so far.
translations.Error while checking the temporary PHP p: Error while checking the temporary PHP path - it was not properly set to a directory. Returned value: %s
translations.The PHP function \"disk_free_space\" is: The PHP function "disk_free_space" is disabled, which prevents the check for enough space in the temporary directories.
translations.Error while checking the available disk: Error while checking the available disk space of temporary PHP path or no free disk space returned. Temporary path: %s
translations.This instance uses an S3 based object st:
This instance uses an S3 based object store as primary storage, and has enough space in the temporary directory.
%s

This instance uses an S3 based object store as primary storage. The uploaded files are stored temporarily on the server and thus it is recommended to have 50 GiB of free space available in the temp directory of PHP. To improve this please change the temporary directory in the php.ini or make more space available in that path. 
Checking the available space in the temporary path resulted in %.1f GiB instead of the recommended 50 GiB. Path: %s
translations.Your database does not run with \"READ C: Your database does not run with "READ COMMITTED" transaction isolation level. This can cause problems when multiple actions are executed in parallel.
translations.Was not able to get transaction isolatio: Was not able to get transaction isolation level: %s
translations.This instance has no second factor provi: This instance has no second factor provider available.
translations.Second factor providers are available bu: Second factor providers are available but two-factor authentication is not enforced.
translations.Second factor providers are available an: Second factor providers are available and enforced: %s.
translations.`check_for_working_wellknown_setup` is s: `check_for_working_wellknown_setup` is set to false in your configuration, so this check was skipped.
translations.Could not check that your web server ser: Could not check that your web server serves `.well-known` correctly. Please check manually.
translations.Your web server is not properly set up t:
Your web server is not properly set up to resolve `.well-known` URLs, failed on:
`%s`
translations.Your server is correctly configured to s: Your server is correctly configured to serve `.well-known` URLs.
translations.Could not check for {extension} loading: Could not check for {extension} loading support. Please check manually if your webserver serves `.{extension}` files.
translations.Your web server is not properly set up t: Your web server is not properly set up to deliver .{extension} files. This is typically an issue with the Nginx configuration. For Nextcloud 15 it needs an adjustment to also deliver .{extension} files. Compare your Nginx configuration to the recommended configuration in our documentation.
translations.Profile picture, full name, email, phone: Profile picture, full name, email, phone number, address, website, Twitter, organisation, role, headline, biography, and whether your profile is enabled
translations.AI tasks can be implemented by different: AI tasks can be implemented by different apps. Here you can set which app should be used for which task.
translations.Allow AI usage for guest users: Allow AI usage for guest users
translations.None of your currently installed apps pr: None of your currently installed apps provide Task processing functionality
translations.Machine translation can be implemented b: Machine translation can be implemented by different apps. Here you can define the precedence of the machine translation apps you have installed at the moment.
translations.Image generation can be implemented by d: Image generation can be implemented by different apps. Here you can set which app should be used.
translations.None of your currently installed apps pr: None of your currently installed apps provide image generation functionality
translations.Text processing tasks can be implemented: Text processing tasks can be implemented by different apps. Here you can set which app should be used for which task.
translations.None of your currently installed apps pr: None of your currently installed apps provide text processing functionality using the Text Processing API.
translations.Here you can decide which group can acce: Here you can decide which group can access certain sections of the administration settings.
translations.Allow apps to use the Share API: اجازه ی برنامه ها برای استفاده از API اشتراک گذاری
translations.Allow sharing with groups: اشتراک گذاری با گروه ها مجاز است
translations.Restrict users to only share with users: محدود کردن کاربران برای اشتراک‌گذاری تنها میان کاربران گروه خود
translations.Ignore the following groups when checkin: Ignore the following groups when checking group membership
translations.Allow users to preview files even if dow: Allow users to preview files even if download is disabled
translations.Users will still be able to screenshot o: Users will still be able to screenshot or record the screen. This does not provide any definitive protection.
translations.Allow users to share via link and emails: Allow users to share via link and emails
translations.Allow public shares to be added to other: Allow public shares to be added to other clouds by federation.
translations.This will add share permissions to all n: This will add share permissions to all newly created link shares.
translations.Enforce password protection: اجبار برای محافظت توسط رمز عبور
translations.Exclude groups from creating link shares: Exclude groups from creating link shares
translations.Allow users to set custom share link tok: Allow users to set custom share link tokens
translations.Shares with custom tokens will continue: Shares with custom tokens will continue to be accessible after this setting has been disabled
translations.Shares with guessable tokens may be acce: Shares with guessable tokens may be accessed easily
translations.Not allowed groups will still be able to: Not allowed groups will still be able to receive shares, but not to initiate them.
translations.Set default expiration date for internal: Set default expiration date for internal shares
translations.Default expiration time of new shares in: Default expiration time of new shares in days
translations.Set default expiration date for shares t: Set default expiration date for shares to other servers
translations.Enforce expiration date for remote share: Enforce expiration date for remote shares
translations.Default expiration time of remote shares: Default expiration time of remote shares in days
translations.Expire remote shares after x days: Expire remote shares after x days
translations.Set default expiration date for shares v: Set default expiration date for shares via link or mail
translations.Enforce expiration date for link or mail: Enforce expiration date for link or mail shares
translations.Default expiration time of shares in day: Default expiration time of shares in days
translations.Allow account name autocompletion in sha: Allow account name autocompletion in share dialog and allow access to the system address book
translations.If autocompletion restrictions for both: If autocompletion restrictions for both "same group" and "phonebook integration" are enabled, a match in either is enough to show the user.
translations.Restrict account name autocompletion and: Restrict account name autocompletion and system address book access to users within the same groups
translations.Restrict account name autocompletion to: Restrict account name autocompletion to users based on their phonebook
translations.Allow autocompletion to full match when: Allow autocompletion to full match when entering the full name (ignoring restrictions like group membership or missing phonebook match)
translations.Also allow autocompletion on full match: Also allow autocompletion on full match of the user ID
Also allow autocompletion on full match of the display name
Also allow autocompletion on full match of the user email
translations.Do not use second user displayname for f: Do not use second user displayname for full match
translations.Show disclaimer text on the public link: Show disclaimer text on the public link upload page (only shown when the file list is hidden)
translations.This text will be shown on the public li: این متن هنگام پنهان کردن لیست پرونده در صفحه بارگذاری پیوند عمومی نشان داده می شود.
translations.Two-factor authentication can be enforce: Two-factor authentication can be enforced for all accounts and specific groups. If they do not have a two-factor provider configured, they will be unable to log into the system.
translations.Enforcement of two-factor authentication: اجبار به احراز هویت دو عاملی فقط می‌تواند برای گروه‌هایی خاص تنظیم شود.
translations.Two-factor authentication is enforced fo: Two-factor authentication is enforced for all members of the following groups.
translations.Two-factor authentication is not enforce: Two-factor authentication is not enforced for members of the following groups.
translations.When groups are selected/excluded, they: When groups are selected/excluded, they use the following logic to determine if an account has 2FA enforced: If no groups are selected, 2FA is enabled for everyone except members of the excluded groups. If groups are selected, 2FA is enabled for all members of these. If an account is both in a selected and excluded group, the selected takes precedence and 2FA is enforced.
translations.Please enter a valid group name: Please enter a valid group name
translations.List of groups. This list is not fully p: List of groups. This list is not fully populated for performance reasons. The groups will be loaded as you navigate or search through the list.
translations.Do you really want to wipe your data fro: واقعاً می خواهید داده‌هایتان را از این افزاره بزدایید؟
translations.Revoking this token might prevent the wi: Revoking this token might prevent the wiping of your device if it has not started the wipe yet.
translations.Only continue if you no longer need the: Only continue if you no longer need the device to be wiped.
translations.The app or device will lose access on it: The app or device will lose access on its next sync. This cannot be undone.
Remote wipe has not started yet.
translations.Revoking now cancels the wipe. The devic: Revoking now cancels the wipe. The device keeps its synced data.
translations.Web, desktop and mobile clients currentl: لیست دستگاه ها و نشست های فعال وارد شده با اکانت شما
translations.Error while creating device token: هنگام ایجاد نشانه وسیله خطایی رخ داد
translations.Could not copy app password. Please copy: نمی توان رمزعبور برنامه را کپی کرد. لطفاً آن را به صورت دستی کپی کنید.
translations.Could not copy login name. Please copy i: Could not copy login name. Please copy it manually.
translations.Use the credentials below to configure y: Use the credentials below to configure your app or device. For security reasons this password will only be shown once.
translations.Show QR code for mobile apps: نمایش کد QR برای برنامه های تلفن همراه
translations.Use system cron service to call the cron: برای تماس با پرونده cron.php هر 5 دقیقه یکبار از سرویس cron system استفاده کنید.
translations.The cron.php needs to be executed by the: The cron.php needs to be executed by the system account "{user}".
translations.The PHP POSIX extension is required. See: The PHP POSIX extension is required. See {linkstart}PHP documentation{linkend} for more details.
translations.Unable to update background job mode: ناتوان در به‌روز رسانی حالت کار پس‌زمینه
translations.For the server to work properly, it's im: For the server to work properly, it's important to configure background jobs correctly. Cron is the recommended setting. Please see the documentation for more information.
translations.Last job execution ran {time}. Something: آخرین کار در {time} اجرا شد. به نظر چیزی اشتباه است.
Execute one task with each page loaded. Use case: Single account instance.
translations.cron.php is registered at a webcron serv: cron.php is registered at a webcron service to call cron.php every 5 minutes over HTTP. Use case: Very small instance (1–5 accounts depending on the usage).
translations.Unable to update profile default setting: ناتوان در به‌روز رسانی تنظیمات پیش‌گزیدهٔ نمایه
translations.Unable to update profile picker setting: Unable to update profile picker setting
translations.Enable or disable profile by default for: Enable or disable profile by default for new accounts.
translations.Enable or disable the profile picker in: Enable or disable the profile picker in the Smart Picker and the profile link previews.
translations.Unable to update server side encryption: Unable to update server side encryption config
translations.Server-side encryption makes it possible: "رمزگذاری سمت سرور" امکان رمزگذاری پرونده های آپلود شده در این سرور را امکان پذیر می کند. که با محدودیت هایی مانند مجازات عملکرد همراه است ، بنابراین در صورت لزوم فعال کنید.
translations.To encrypt all existing files run this O: To encrypt all existing files run this OCC command:
translations.Disabling server side encryption is only: Disabling server side encryption is only possible using OCC, please refer to the documentation.
translations.No encryption module loaded, please enab: هیچ ماژول رمزگذاری‌ای بارگذاری نشده است، لطفا ماژول رمز‌گذاری را در منو برنامه فعال کنید.
translations.You need to migrate your encryption keys: You need to migrate your encryption keys from the old encryption (ownCloud <= 8.0) to the new one. Please enable the "Default encryption module" and run {command}
translations.Please read carefully before activating: Please read carefully before activating server-side encryption:
translations.Once encryption is enabled, all files up: پس از فعال سازی رمزگذاری ، تمام پرونده های بارگذاری شده از آن نقطه به سرور بارگیری می شوند و در حالت آماده به کار روی سرور رمزگذاری می شوند. غیرفعال کردن رمزگذاری در صورتی که ماژول رمزگذاری فعال از آن عملکرد پشتیبانی کند، در تاریخ بعد امکان پذیر است و کلیه پیش شرط ها (به عنوان مثال تنظیم کلید بازیابی) برآورده می شوند.
translations.By default a master key for the whole in: By default a master key for the whole instance will be generated. Please check if that level of access is compliant with your needs.
translations.Encryption alone does not guarantee secu: رمزگذاری به تنهایی امنیت سیستم را تضمین نمی کند. لطفاً برای اطلاعات بیشتر درباره چگونگی عملکرد برنامه رمزگذاری و موارد استفاده از پشتیبانی ، به اسناد مراجعه کنید.
translations.Be aware that encryption always increase: توجه داشته باشید که همواره رمزگذاری حجم فایل را افزایش خواهد داد.
translations.It is always good to create regular back: همیشه خوب است که از داده های خود نسخه پشتیبان تهیه کنید ، در صورت رمزگذاری مطمئن شوید که از کلیدهای رمزنگاری به همراه داده خود نسخه پشتیبان تهیه کنید.
translations.Refer to the admin documentation on how: Refer to the admin documentation on how to manually also encrypt existing files.
translations.This is the final warning: Do you really: این آخرین اخطار است: آیا می‌خواهید رمزگذاری را فعال کنید ؟
translations.You are about to delete the group \"{gro: You are about to delete the group "{group}". The accounts will NOT be deleted.
translations.Choose your profile picture: عکس نمایهٔ خود را انتخاب کنید
translations.Please select a valid png or jpg file: لطفاً یک فایل png یا jpg معتبر انتخاب کنید
translations.Choose profile picture from Files: تصویر نمایه‌تان را از پرونده‌ها انتخاب کنید
translations.The file must be a PNG or JPG: فرمت فایل باید PNG یا JPG باشد
translations.Picture provided by original account: نگاره فراهم شده به دست حساب اصلی
translations.Set as profile picture: به عنوان عکس نمایه تنظیم کنید
translations.Please note that it can take up to 24 ho: لطفاً توجه داشته باشید که ممکن است تا 24 ساعت طول بکشد تا عکس نمایه شما در همه جا به روز شود.
translations.Unable to update primary email address: Unable to update primary email address

translations.Unable to delete primary email address: Unable to delete primary email address
translations.Unable to add additional email address: Unable to add additional email address
translations.Unable to update additional email addres: Unable to update additional email address
translations.Primary email for password reset and not: ایمیل اصلی برای بازیابی رمز عبور و دریافت اعلان ها
translations.Unable to update first day of week: Unable to update first day of week
translations.Day to use as the first day of week: Day to use as the first day of week
translations.Unable to update profile enabled state: Unable to update profile enabled state
translations.The more restrictive setting of either v: ملاک عمل، تنظیمات با محدودیت بالاتر است که اعمال می شوند. برای مثال، اگر "قابلیت دیده شدن" در وضعیت "نمایش برای همه" تنظیم شده باشد و "محدوده دیده شدن" در وضعیت "خصوصی" تنظیم شده باشد، تنظیم به وضعیت "خصوصی" که محدودیت بیشتری اعمال میکند اعمال خواهد شد.
translations.Change scope level of {property}, curren: Change scope level of {property}, current scope is {scope}
translations.Unable to update federation scope of the: Unable to update federation scope of the primary {property}
translations.Unable to update federation scope of add: Unable to update federation scope of additional {property}
translations.Password change is disabled because the: تغییر رمز غیرفعال شده است زیرا کلید اصلی غیرفعال شده است
translations.List of accounts. This list is not fully: List of accounts. This list is not fully rendered for performance reasons. The accounts will be rendered as you navigate through the list.
translations.Either password or email is required: Either password or email is required
translations.Disconnect all devices and delete local: Disconnect all devices and delete local data
translations.In case of lost device or exiting the or: In case of lost device or exiting the organization, this can remotely wipe the {productName} data from all devices associated with {userid}. Only works if the devices are connected to the internet.
translations.Remote wipe of devices: پاک کردن از راه دور دستگاه ها
translations.Fully delete {userid}'s account includin: حساب {userid} را با تمام پرونده های شخصی ، داده های برنامه و غیره به طور کامل حذف کنید.
translations.The system config enforces sorting the g: The system config enforces sorting the groups by name. This also disables showing the member count.
translations.Sorting only applies to the currently lo: Sorting only applies to the currently loaded groups for performance reasons. Groups will be loaded as you navigate or search through the list.
translations.Send welcome email to new accounts: Send welcome email to new accounts
translations.Select default quota: سهمیه پیش فرض را انتخاب کنید
translations.Server error while trying to complete We: Server error while trying to complete WebAuthn device registration
translations.Passwordless authentication requires a s: Passwordless authentication requires a secure connection.
translations.Set up your account for passwordless aut: Set up your account for passwordless authentication following the FIDO2 standard.
translations.The following devices are configured for: The following devices are configured for your account:
Your browser does not support WebAuthn.
translations.It is important to set up this server to: تنظیم این سرور برای این مهم است که بتواند ایمیل ارسال کند ، مانند تنظیم مجدد گذرواژه و اعلان ها.
translations.The server configuration is read-only so: The server configuration is read-only so the mail settings cannot be changed using the web interface.
translations.Mail delivery is disabled by instance co: Mail delivery is disabled by instance config "{config}".
translations.Please double check the {linkStartInstal: Please double check the {linkStartInstallationGuides}installation guides{linkEnd}, and check for any errors or warnings in the {linkStartLog}log{linkEnd}.
translations.Check the security of your {productName}: Check the security of your {productName} over {linkStart}our security scan{linkEnd}.
translations.It is important for the security and per: It is important for the security and performance of your instance that everything is configured correctly. To help you with that we are doing some automatic checks. Please see the linked documentation for more information.
تمامی موارد با موفقیت چک شدند.
translations.There are some errors regarding your set: برخی از خطاها در مورد راه اندازی شما وجود دارد
translations.There are some warnings regarding your s: هشدارهایی درباره تنظیم شما وجود دارد.
translations.As admin you can fine-tune the sharing b: به عنوان مدیر ، می توانید رفتار اشتراک گذاری را تنظیم کنید. لطفا برای اطلاعات بیشتر به اسناد مراجعه کنید.
You need to enable the File sharing App.
translations.Select a configuration preset for easy s: Select a configuration preset for easy setup.
translations.For performance reasons, when you enable: For performance reasons, when you enable encryption on a {productName} server only new and changed files are encrypted.
translations.Headline: عنوان
translations.Only visible to people matched via phone: نمایان تنها برای افرادی که با یکپارچگی شماره تلفن از طریق Talk روی تلفن همراه مطابقند
translations.Not available as this property is requir: Not available as this property is required for core functionality including file sharing and calendar invitations
translations.Only visible to people on this instance: نمایان تنها برای افراد روی این نمونه و میهانان
translations.Only synchronize to trusted servers: هم‌گام سازی تنها با کارسازهای مورد اعتماد
translations.Not available as federation has been dis: Not available as federation has been disabled for your account, contact your system administration if you have any questions
translations.Synchronize to trusted servers and the g: هم‌گام سازی با کارسازهای مورد اعتماد و دفترچه نشانی‌های عمومی
translations.Not available as publishing account spec: Not available as publishing account specific data to the lookup server is not allowed, contact your system administration if you have any questions
translations.Show to logged in accounts only: فقط به حساب‌هایی که وارد شده‌اند نمایش یابد
translations.Could not register device: Network error: Could not register device: Network error

translations.There were too many requests from your n: There were too many requests from your network. Retry later or contact your administrator if this is an error.

translations.If you use third party applications to c: If you use third party applications to connect to Nextcloud, please make sure to create and configure an app password for each before enabling second factor authentication.

translations.Featured apps are developed by and withi: برنامه‌های برگزیده توسط و در داخل جامعه توسعه داده می‌شوند. این برنامه‌ها، عملکردهای مرکزی را ارائه می‌دهند و برای استفاده نهایی آماده هستند.

translations.No environment variables defined: هیچ متغیر محیطی‌ای تعریف نشده است

translations.Default Deploy daemon is not accessible: دسترسی به Deploy daemon پیش‌فرض ممکن نیست

translations.The app will be downloaded from the App: The app will be downloaded from the App Store
translations.This app is not marked as compatible wit: This app is not marked as compatible with your {productName} version.
translations.If you continue you will still be able t: If you continue you will still be able to install the app. Note that the app might not work as expected.
translations.The app has been enabled but needs to be: این برنامه فعال شده است اما باید به‌روزرسانی شود.
translations.Error: This app cannot be enabled becaus: Error: This app cannot be enabled because it makes the server unstable
translations.The app has been enabled but needs to be: برنامه فعال شده است اما باید به روز شود. شما پس از 5 ثانیه به صفحه بروزرسانی هدایت می شوید.
translations.Office suite switching is managed throug: جابجایی مجموعه‌ی اداری از طریق رابط Nextcloud All-in-One مدیریت می‌شود.
translations.Please use the AIO interface to switch b: لطفاً برای جابجایی میان مجموعه‌های اداری از رابط AIO استفاده کنید.
translations.Select your preferred office suite. Plea: Select your preferred office suite. Please note that installing requires manual server setup.
translations.Best security: documents never leave you: بهترین امنیت: اسناد هرگز از سرور شما خارج نمی‌شوند
